com.mentor.chs.plugin.library

Interface IXLibraryTabPanelProvider

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXPlugin

    public interface IXLibraryTabPanelProvider
extends IXPlugin
    This will be called by Library to find out the applicable tab pages for groups (getTabPages()) and tab panels for group and tab name (getTabPanels() There could be multiple implementation of this interface and all of them will be called to get the external tab pages and panels

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static class  IXLibraryTabPanelProvider.LibraryGroupName 
      static class  IXLibraryTabPanelProvider.LibraryTabName 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.Set<IXLibraryTabPage> getTabPages(IXLibraryTabPanelProvider.LibraryGroupName groupName)
      Get the applicable tab pages applicable for the supplied library group
      java.util.Set<IXLibraryTabPanel> getTabPanels(IXLibraryTabPanelProvider.LibraryGroupName groupName, IXLibraryTabPanelProvider.LibraryTabName tabName)
      Get the applicable tab panels applicable for the supplied library group and library tab page

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion

    • Method Detail

      • getTabPanels

        java.util.Set<IXLibraryTabPanel> getTabPanels(IXLibraryTabPanelProvider.LibraryGroupName groupName,
                                              IXLibraryTabPanelProvider.LibraryTabName tabName)
        Get the applicable tab panels applicable for the supplied library group and library tab page
        Parameters:
        groupName - LibraryGroupName library part group name
        tabName - LibraryTabName libray tab page
        Returns:
        list of tab panels applicable

      • getTabPages

        java.util.Set<IXLibraryTabPage> getTabPages(IXLibraryTabPanelProvider.LibraryGroupName groupName)
        Get the applicable tab pages applicable for the supplied library group
        Parameters:
        groupName - LibraryGroupName
        Returns:
        list of tab pages applicable
